entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-SingelAccount/Group Creation-Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String><?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ResourceObject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="NetBIOSName"/> <entry key="accountFlags"> <value> <List> <String>Normal User Account</String> </List> </value> </entry> <entry key="cn" value="Abdul samad"/> <entry key="department" value="AllRounder"/> <entry key="displayName" value="Abdul samad"/> <entry key="distinguishedName" value="CN=Abdul samad,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <entry key="employeeID" value="sr19"/> <entry key="givenName" value="abdul"/> <entry key="mail" value="abdul.samad@sunrisers.com"/> <entry key="memberOf"> <value> <List> <String>CN=campusAccess,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> <String>CN=Buyer,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> <String>CN=Benefits,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> value="user"/> <entry key="objectguid" value="{a2084c53-e5e5-4d1c-9206-07881b55473e}"/> <entry key="physicalDeliveryOfficeName" value="AllRounder"/> <entry key="sAMAccountName" value="Abdul samad"/>
